planName: Plan Features Tab Redesign — Manual QA
planSummary: Phase 4 of Plan Features Overhaul (PR #102): super-admin Plans → Features tab redesign with grouped sections, search, presets, and diff-preview dialog.
runSummary: Vitest-driven verification of pure helpers (preset, filter, diff) + UI components (PresetButtons, FeatureSearch, FeatureRow, FeatureGroupSection, DiffPreviewDialog). Live browser smoke deferred due to Node 25 ESM env issue.

cases.summary: filterCatalog is case-insensitive across nameEn + descEn
cases.text:
Run: cd apps/admin && npm run test -- --run filter
Expected: 3/3 cases pass.

cases.summary: applyPreset('PRO') turns ON all PRO boolean keys, OFF all ENTERPRISE keys
cases.text:
Run: cd apps/admin && npm run test -- --run presets
Expected: PRO preset case passes — output PlanLimits has every PRO-tier boolean=true and every ENTERPRISE-tier boolean=false.

cases.summary: applyPreset('ENTERPRISE') turns ON all boolean keys
cases.text:
Run: cd apps/admin && npm run test -- --run presets
Expected: ENTERPRISE preset case passes — every boolean key=true.

cases.summary: applyPreset('DISABLE_ALL') turns OFF every boolean key (preserves quotas)
cases.text:
Run: cd apps/admin && npm run test -- --run presets
Expected: DISABLE_ALL case passes — every boolean=false; numeric quotas unchanged.

Run: cd apps/admin && npm run test -- --run presets
Expected: returned object is a fresh reference; the original input is unchanged.

Run: cd apps/admin && npm run test -- --run diff
Expected: 3/3 cases — empty diff when no downgrades; single-key diff for one downgrade; multi-key diff for several downgrades.

cases.summary: Save flow gates DiffPreviewDialog behind activeSubscribers > 0 AND diff.length > 0
cases.text: Code-trace: apps/admin/app/(admin)/plans/[id]/edit/page.tsx — submit() opens <DiffPreviewDialog> only when both conditions are met; otherwise saves directly.
